requirement_topic.en: EEC Project Grid Connection — 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings, Anti-Islanding, and Weak-Grid Review
requirement_topic.zh: EEC项目并网——50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数、防孤岛和弱电网审查
requirement_topic.zht: EEC項目併網——50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數、防孤島和弱電網審查

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters in Eritrea should be treated as requiring project-specific technical acceptance by Eritrean Electricity Corporation (EEC), the project owner, or the responsible ministry because a strong public national standards-body route for solar inverters could not be confirmed. Eritrea is a 50 Hz market and low-voltage supply should be treated as 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase. That frequency aligns with China, but the voltage does not: China is 220/380 V under GB/T 156. Inverter firmware, voltage/frequency trip thresholds, reconnection delay, anti-islanding, harmonic performance, and ride-through behavior should therefore be validated for Eritrea's 230/400 V, 50 Hz conditions and for weak or isolated grid segments.
summary.zh: 厄立特里亚并网光伏逆变器应视为需要由厄立特里亚电力公司（EEC）、项目业主或主管部委进行项目特定技术验收，因为未能确认存在面向太阳能逆变器的强公开国家标准机构路径。厄立特里亚为50 Hz市场，低压供电应按单相230 V / 三相400 V处理。该频率与中国一致，但电压不同：中国依据GB/T 156为220/380 V。因此，逆变器固件、电压/频率跳闸阈值、重连延迟、防孤岛、谐波性能和穿越行为应针对厄立特里亚230/400 V、50 Hz条件及薄弱或孤立电网段进行验证。
summary.zht: 厄利垂亞併網光伏逆變器應視為需要由厄利垂亞電力公司（EEC）、項目業主或主管部委進行項目特定技術驗收，因為未能確認存在面向太陽能逆變器的強公開國家標準機構路徑。厄利垂亞為50 Hz市場，低壓供電應按單相230 V / 三相400 V處理。該頻率與中國一致，但電壓不同：中國依據GB/T 156為220/380 V。因此，逆變器韌體、電壓/頻率跳脫閾值、重連延遲、防孤島、諧波性能和穿越行為應針對厄利垂亞230/400 V、50 Hz條件及薄弱或孤立電網段進行驗證。

standards_or_laws: Eritrean Electricity Corporation (EEC) project-specific grid-connection review where applicable
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 60038 — IEC standard voltages, including 230/400 V low-voltage systems
Eritrea grid context commonly treated as 230/400 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station connection, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected PV inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 37408-2021 for PV grid-connected inverter requirements. These documents are prepared for Chinese grid conditions and Chinese conformity programmes. They do not create automatic EEC or project-owner acceptance in Eritrea, especially because the nominal low-voltage profile differs: China is 220/380 V at 50 Hz while Eritrea should be treated as 230/400 V at 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及GB/T 37408-2021光伏并网逆变器技术要求。这些文件面向中国电网条件和中国合格评定项目，不会在厄立特里亚自动形成EEC或项目业主接受，尤其是标称低压参数不同：中国为50 Hz 220/380 V，而厄立特里亚应按50 Hz 230/400 V处理。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及GB/T 37408-2021光伏併網逆變器技術要求。這些文件面向中國電網條件和中國合格評定項目，不會在厄利垂亞自動形成EEC或項目業主接受，尤其是標稱低壓參數不同：中國為50 Hz 220/380 V，而厄利垂亞應按50 Hz 230/400 V處理。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T grid evidence is not a substitute for EEC or project-owner acceptance in Eritrea. Exporters should prepare IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, a 230/400 V 50 Hz firmware profile, protection-setting schedule, single-line diagram, commissioning procedure, and site-specific power-quality analysis. Because Eritrea has low electrification, isolated loads, and weak-grid or off-grid conditions, projects should also confirm generator, battery, mini-grid, or hybrid operating modes before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网证据不能替代厄立特里亚EEC或项目业主验收。出口商应准备IEC 62116防孤岛证据、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、230/400 V 50 Hz固件配置、保护整定表、单线图、调试程序以及场址特定电能质量分析。由于厄立特里亚电气化水平低，存在孤立负荷以及弱电网或离网条件，项目还应在出货前确认发电机、电池、微电网或混合运行模式。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網證據不能替代厄利垂亞EEC或項目業主驗收。出口商應準備IEC 62116防孤島證據、IEC 61727公用電網介面證據、230/400 V 50 Hz韌體配置、保護整定表、單線圖、調試程序以及場址特定電能品質分析。由於厄利垂亞電氣化水平低，存在孤立負荷以及弱電網或離網條件，項目還應在出貨前確認發電機、電池、微電網或混合運行模式。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory in practice for any EEC-connected or owner-reviewed grid-tied installation; IEC evidence is commonly the defensible baseline where no public national inverter grid code is confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T and NB/T grid evidence supports China-side compliance only and is not automatically transferable to Eritrea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Eritrea grid connection as a separate project approval gate. Provide IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence and validate inverter settings for 230/400 V at 50 Hz; the frequency matches China, but the nominal voltage does not. Confirm current EEC, ministry, project-owner, and donor requirements before committing equipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将厄立特里亚并网视为独立项目审批门槛。提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并按230/400 V、50 Hz验证逆变器参数；频率与中国一致，但标称电压不同。在承诺设备前，请确认现行EEC、主管部委、项目业主和捐助方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將厄利垂亞併網視為獨立項目審批門檻。提供IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並按230/400 V、50 Hz驗證逆變器參數；頻率與中國一致，但標稱電壓不同。在承諾設備前，請確認現行EEC、主管部委、項目業主和捐助方要求。
